name: David Foster
abstract: David Walter Foster  (born November 1, 1949) is a Canadian and American record producer, composer, arranger, and musician. He has won 16 Grammy Awards from 45 nominations across four decades (the 1970s, 1980s, 1990s, and 2000s).

about_quotes.speaker: Mandel Johnny
about_quotes.evidence: And I’ve worked a lot with David Foster doing all those kinds of records.
about_quotes.doc_title: Mandel Johnny — Smithsonian Jazz Oral History

about_quotes.speaker: Jerry Hey
about_quotes.evidence: Quincy, David Foster or any of these things, they would send me a cassette of the song... track, which was basically David Foster, you just write whatever you want to write
about_quotes.doc_title: Jerry Hey interviewed by Monk Rowe, via Zoom, November 2, 2023

about_quotes.speaker: Fred Lipsius
about_quotes.evidence: I heard this girl Charice... A year later she got a thirteen million dollar deal through David Foster who is the Hit Man... And he had heard of her.
about_quotes.doc_title: Fred Lipsius interviewed by Monk Rowe. Boston, Massachusetts, July 25, 2018

about_quotes.speaker: Bill Holman
about_quotes.evidence: Then there were two others in that first album that David Foster called me to do
about_quotes.doc_title: Bill Holman interviewed by Monk Rowe, Los Angeles, California, February 13, 1999
